title: Bionano Genomics (BNGO) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: Bionano Genomics (BNGO) analyst consensus shows bullish expectations with strong buy ratings from multiple research firms. The consensus rating is Strong Buy based on analysis of Wall Street analysts covering the stock. Analyst price targets vary across sources with average targets ranging from $4 to $6 per share, representing significant upside potential from current levels. Key analyst expectations focus on several positive drivers: strong clinical evidence supporting OGM technology across indications, successful implementation of new CPT codes and reimbursement pathway, potential for significant revenue growth as utilization increases among installed base, and possible improvements in profitability metrics. Recent positive catalysts include the 47% increase in CPT 81195 reimbursement rates and the new Category I CPT code 81354 for constitutional genetic disorders. Analysts highlight consumables revenue growth and software adoption as key metrics to watch. The company's strategic focus on routine use customers is viewed as prudent given the current financial position.
